approved_command_preview:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode SchemaOnly -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$schemaFiles = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema') -Filter 'table.*.schema.json'
$tables = @{}
foreach ($schemaFile in $schemaFiles) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $tables[$s.id] = $s.name }
$links = foreach ($schemaFile in $schemaFiles) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach ($f in @($s.fields)) { if ($f.type -eq 'multipleRecordLinks') { $targetId = $null; if ($f.options -and $f.options.linkedTableId) { $targetId = [string]$f.options.linkedTableId }; [pscustomobject]@{ source_table_id=$s.id; source_table_name=$s.name; field_id=$f.id; field_name=$f.name; target_table_id=$targetId; target_table_name=$(if ($targetId -and $tables.ContainsKey($targetId)) { $tables[$targetId] } else { $null }); inverse_link_field_id=$(if ($f.options -and $f.options.inverseLinkFieldId) { [string]$f.options.inverseLinkFieldId } else { $null }) } } } }
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs01_link_map_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$links | Sort-Object source_table_name, field_name | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'linked_record_dependencies.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# WBS01 linked-record dependency map','','Generated by chatgpt-exec from read-only Airtable schema export.','','| source table | field | target table | inverse field id |','|---|---|---|---|') + ($links | Sort-Object source_table_name, field_name | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.source_table_name + ' | ' + $_.field_name + ' | ' + $(if ($_.target_table_name) { $_.target_table_name } else { $_.target_table_id }) + ' | ' + $_.inverse_link_field_id + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'linked_record_dependencies.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated WBS01 linked-record map at ' + $outDir)
command:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode SchemaOnly -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$schemaFiles = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema') -Filter 'table.*.schema.json'
$tables = @{}
foreach ($schemaFile in $schemaFiles) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $tables[$s.id] = $s.name }
$links = foreach ($schemaFile in $schemaFiles) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach ($f in @($s.fields)) { if ($f.type -eq 'multipleRecordLinks') { $targetId = $null; if ($f.options -and $f.options.linkedTableId) { $targetId = [string]$f.options.linkedTableId }; [pscustomobject]@{ source_table_id=$s.id; source_table_name=$s.name; field_id=$f.id; field_name=$f.name; target_table_id=$targetId; target_table_name=$(if ($targetId -and $tables.ContainsKey($targetId)) { $tables[$targetId] } else { $null }); inverse_link_field_id=$(if ($f.options -and $f.options.inverseLinkFieldId) { [string]$f.options.inverseLinkFieldId } else { $null }) } } } }
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs01_link_map_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$links | Sort-Object source_table_name, field_name | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'linked_record_dependencies.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# WBS01 linked-record dependency map','','Generated by chatgpt-exec from read-only Airtable schema export.','','| source table | field | target table | inverse field id |','|---|---|---|---|') + ($links | Sort-Object source_table_name, field_name | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.source_table_name + ' | ' + $_.field_name + ' | ' + $(if ($_.target_table_name) { $_.target_table_name } else { $_.target_table_id }) + ' | ' + $_.inverse_link_field_id + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'linked_record_dependencies.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated WBS01 linked-record map at ' + $outDir)
